description: JioHotstar account-flag fix. The re-signed build was sending IsTampered=true in the device-attestation blob (Kg/b) it posts to the server, which locked the account 24h for "suspicious activity" (error NM-4290). Adds "Spoof device attestation": forces all 8 attestation security flags (IsEmulator/IsRooted/IsTampered/IsProxy/isVpnActive/isSuspiciousFileExists/isPortsOpen/isDebuggerEnabled) to false at the blob constructor, so the app reports a clean device. WARNING: this only removes a client-sent signal — the server still sees the VPN exit IP and an already-flagged account stays on Hotstars radar. Do NOT run on an account you cannot afford to lose; test on a throwaway Jio number first. Other apps unchanged.
